info.title: NTI API
info.description: REST API pre platformu Národná technologická iniciatíva (NTI) — registrácie, prihlášky, hodnotenie, projekty, dokumenty, CMS a administráciu.

get.summary: [Admin] Get dashboard summary stats (user count, pending applications, latest users)
[Admin] List submitted student applications awaiting review
[Admin] List submitted company applications awaiting review

post.summary: [Admin] Approve a pending student application
[Admin] Reject a pending student application
[Admin] Approve a pending company application
[Admin] Reject a pending company application

get.summary: List applications (paginated)

post.summary: Create a draft application for the current team and an open call

403.description: Not authorized to create applications

get.summary: Get a single application with team, organization, answers and pairing submissions

403.description: Not authorized to view this application

put.summary: Update an application's answers, pairing submissions or organization

403.description: Not authorized to update this application
Not authorized to delete this application

post.summary: Submit a draft application for committee review

403.description: Not authorized to submit this application

post.summary: [Committee] Approve, reject or request supplements for a submitted application

403.description: Not authorized to decide on this application

post.summary: Register a new account (student, mentor, company or internal role)

201.description: Account created, returns auth token and user

post.summary: Authenticate with email and password and obtain an API token

get.summary: Get the currently authenticated user and their notifications

200.description: Current user with roles and notifications

post.summary: Revoke the current API token (log out)
Send a password reset link to the given email address
Confirm the email address using the verification code sent at registration
post.description:
Подтверждение e-mail адреса по коду, отправленному при регистрации.
Spec 6.2: "registrácia e-mailom s overením adresy".

post.summary: Resend the email verification code

post.description: Create and queue a bulk message for sending

403.description: Not authorized to create bulk messages

get.summary: [Admin] Get a single bulk message with recipient counts and sender
get.description: Get single bulk message with delivery details

403.description: Not authorized to view this bulk message

post.summary: Request an email confirmation code needed to download a confidential document
post.description: Send an email confirmation code required to download confidential documents

200.description: Confirmation code sent to the user's email

403.description: Not authorized to download this document

422.description: Document is not confidential and needs no confirmation

get.summary: Download a document (confidential documents require a ?code= confirmation code)
get.description:
Download document. Confidential documents require a verified email confirmation code first
(see requestAccessCode), obtained via Redis-backed EmailConfirmationService.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Email confirmation code for confidential documents

403.description: Not authorized to download this document

428.description: Confirmation code required for confidential document

403.description: Not authorized to view this document

post.summary: Generate a PDF document by filling in an uploaded template with data

403.description: Not authorized to create documents or view the template

get.summary: List active programs
Get a single program
Get the application form fields for a program (and optionally a specific call)
get.description:
Spec 6.3: configurable application form per program/call/applicant type.
Returns the program-wide fields plus, when a call is given, that call's specific fields.
